Article.ArticleTitle: Research on the plugging mechanism in fractured formations and the drilling fluid system for while-drilling leak prevention.

KeywordList.Keyword: Drilling fluid system for while-drilling leak prevention

MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: Declarations. Competing interests: The authors declare no competing interests.

Reference.Citation: Kong, W. et al. Numerical simulation of drilling fluid leakage prevention and plugging in fractured leakage formation. Drill. Eng. 52 (4), 46–53 (2025).

Zhang, P. et al. Study on factors affecting powder dispersion density in laser powder bed melting technology. Adv. Laser Optoelectron. 61 (05), 359–377 (2024).
